title: Email Collection Refusal Policy
warning_desc: We refuse the unauthorized collection of email addresses posted on this website through email harvesting programs or other technical means. Please note that violations may result in criminal penalties under Korean information and communications law.
sec1_desc: HUA-Labs prohibits unauthorized collection of email addresses in accordance with Article 50-2 of the Act on Promotion of Information and Communications Network Utilization and Information Protection.
sec2_items: Automatic collection of email addresses using email harvesting programs
Collection of email addresses through web crawling, scraping, etc.
Unauthorized email collection using other technical means
Commercial use of collected email addresses
Collection of email addresses for spam distribution
sec3_desc: Unauthorized email collection may be punished under the following laws:
sec3_items: **Act on Promotion of Information and Communications Network Utilization and Information Protection** Article 50-2
sec4_desc: Violations may result in the following penalties:
sec4_items: **Criminal Penalty:** Up to 1 year imprisonment or fine up to 10 million KRW
**Civil Liability:** Compensation for damages to victims
sec5_desc: If you wish to collect email addresses, you must use the following methods:
sec5_items: With explicit consent from the data subject
When directly provided by the data subject
When collecting publicly available information through legitimate means
sec6_desc: If you discover unauthorized email collection, please report it to:
sec7_desc: We implement the following technical measures to protect email addresses:
sec7_items: Detection and blocking of automated collection tools
Rate limiting to prevent excessive access
info_desc: For service-related inquiries, please contact us directly at contact@hua-labs.com. We will respond sincerely to legitimate inquiries.
disclaimer_text: This is a reference translation. The Korean version is the legally binding document.
